event: Standing Figure of a Holy Deacon
symbols: red dalmatic — the liturgical vestment of a deacon, also suggesting the blood of martyrdom
ornate golden halo — sanctity and divine glory
hands joined in prayer — the deacon's intercessory role in the liturgy
gold background — the heavenly realm and timelessness of sacred art
description: A full-length standing figure of a young tonsured man in a bright red dalmatic with gold embroidered panels at the chest and hem, set within a narrow gold-ground altarpiece panel with a Gothic pointed arch frame. His hands are pressed together in prayer. A large ornate golden halo with detailed patterning surrounds his head. He stands on a small green ground area. The panel frame is white with Gothic tracery at top. The figure is rendered in the International Gothic style with elegant linear drapery folds.
